name: Park 101
description: Multi-level rooftop bar and restaurant in Carlsbad Village. BBQ, craft beer, cocktails, big screens, game day headquarters, family and pet friendly, weekly events, brunch, and private event spaces.
shortDescription: Carlsbad's rooftop sports bar, BBQ, and game day headquarters — one block from the beach in Carlsbad Village.

rooftop.headline: The Rooftop
rooftop.description: Open-air rooftop deck with sweeping views of Carlsbad Village and the Pacific. Fire pits, communal tables, and California skies year-round.

courtyard.headline: The Courtyard
courtyard.description: The heart of Park 101 — an open-air central courtyard with the massive LED wall, fire pit seating, multiple bars, and string lights overhead. This is where game day, happy hour, and everything in between happens.

sports.headline: Game Day Headquarters
sports.description: North County's game day destination. Massive LED TV wall in the open-air courtyard, 20+ screens throughout, and a crowd that shows up for every kickoff, first pitch, and fight night.

indoorBar.headline: The Indoor Bar & Dining Room
indoorBar.description: Climate-controlled indoor seating with a full bar, big screens, and communal tables — the spot for when you want the Park 101 energy without the weather.

familiesPets.headline: Everyone's Welcome
familiesPets.description: Families and four-legged friends are always welcome at Park 101. Dog-friendly patio, a relaxed atmosphere, and a menu built for groups of all ages.

liveEvents.headline: Live Music & Events
liveEvents.description: Weekly live music, themed nights, seasonal events, and community gatherings. Park 101 is where North County comes together.

privateEvents.name: Birthday Parties
privateEvents.headline: Your Birthday, Our Rooftop
privateEvents.description: Celebrate with the whole crew. Private or semi-private spaces, custom menus, and a rooftop setting that makes every birthday unforgettable.

faqs.q: How many guests can a birthday party hold at Park 101?
faqs.a: Up to 150 guests, across private or semi-private spaces depending on your group size.

faqs.q: Can I customize the menu for a birthday party?
faqs.a: Yes — custom menus and bar packages are built around your event and your crowd.

faqs.q: Do I need a deposit to lock in my date?
faqs.a: Yes. Once your plan is finalized, a deposit secures the date.

privateEvents.name: Corporate Events
privateEvents.headline: Team Events That Actually Deliver
privateEvents.description: Company happy hours, team outings, client entertaining, and corporate buyouts. Full AV capability, flexible spaces, and catering that impresses.

faqs.q: Does Park 101 have AV for presentations?
faqs.a: Yes — full AV capability is available for presentations, client entertaining, and team events.

faqs.q: Can we book a full corporate buyout?
faqs.a: Yes. Corporate events can scale up to a full private buyout for up to 200 guests.
Catering packages are built around your event as part of the corporate events program.

privateEvents.name: Full Venue Buyout
privateEvents.headline: The Whole Place Is Yours
privateEvents.description: Take over the entire Park 101 experience — rooftop, courtyard, indoor bars, and all. Full buyouts available for large events, filming, and exclusive gatherings.

faqs.q: How many guests fit in a full venue buyout?
faqs.a: Up to 300 guests across the rooftop, courtyard, and indoor bar combined.

faqs.q: Can a full buyout be used for filming?
faqs.a: Yes — full buyouts are available for large events, filming, and exclusive gatherings.

faqs.q: Is staffing included with a buyout?
faqs.a: Yes — dedicated staff and custom programming are included with a full venue buyout.

privateEvents.name: Game Day Parties
privateEvents.headline: Reserve the Rooftop for the Big Game
privateEvents.description: Book a private section for your crew on game day. LED wall, dedicated screens, table service, and food and drink packages built for the occasion.

faqs.q: How many guests can a game day party hold?
faqs.a: Up to 80 guests, with dedicated screen access for your section.

faqs.q: Do I have to book the whole venue for a game day party?
faqs.a: No — you can reserve a section, the rooftop, or the courtyard depending on your group size.
Yes — table service and food and drink packages are built into game day party bookings.

privateEvents.name: Rehearsal Dinners
privateEvents.headline: Start the Celebration Right
privateEvents.description: A relaxed, elevated setting for the night before the big day. Semi-private spaces, family-style menus, and a rooftop sunset that sets the tone.

faqs.q: How many guests can a rehearsal dinner hold?
faqs.a: Up to 80 guests, in a semi-private space.

faqs.q: Is the menu customizable for a rehearsal dinner?
faqs.a: Yes — family-style menus are built around your group.

faqs.q: Can we get rooftop sunset views for a rehearsal dinner?
faqs.a: Yes — the rooftop's sunset views are one of the most popular settings for rehearsal dinners.

eventTypes.name: NFL Sundays
eventTypes.description: Every NFL Sunday, all season long, across the LED wall and 20+ screens throughout the venue.

eventTypes.name: MLB Games
eventTypes.description: A regular spot for Padres games and MLB action all season.

eventTypes.name: UFC Fight Nights
eventTypes.description: Fight night viewing on the biggest screen in the courtyard.

eventTypes.name: Fantasy Draft Events
eventTypes.description: Bring the league — space and screens for fantasy draft day.

eventTypes.name: Live Music
eventTypes.description: Live bands and country nights in the courtyard.

eventTypes.name: Themed Nights & Seasonal Events
eventTypes.description: Seasonal programming and themed nights throughout the year.

Packed crowd at Park 101 Carlsbad for a big game

seo.defaultTitle: Park 101 | Rooftop Bar & Restaurant in Carlsbad Village
seo.defaultDescription: Multi-level rooftop bar and restaurant in Carlsbad Village, CA. BBQ, craft beer, cocktails, 20+ screens, game day headquarters — one block from the beach.
